title: clavula fluitans
intro: Clavula fluitans, also known as the 'Clove of the Woods' or 'Tree Fennel', is a flowering plant native to Asia and Australia. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been shown to have numerous health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and fighting off infections. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
